_comment: cause->fix rules for the verdict engine. Data, not code (eng-review Q2): add a failure mode by appending a rule + a test, no code change. A rule matches when EVERY key in `when` equals the matching field on the RunObservation. First match wins, so order specific-before-general. `when` values may be a scalar or a list of accepted scalars.

rules.cause: the transport completes without a content check, so corrupt bytes are accepted and reported as delivered
rules.fix: gate completion on a content hash - use a verified uploader (SVU) or verify after transfer before trusting DELIVERED

rules.cause: a resumed transfer reported complete but left high-index gaps it never re-fetched
rules.fix: verify the whole file after a resume, not only the resumed range

rules.cause: a best-effort command packet was dropped and never retransmitted, so the write never landed
rules.fix: confirm-and-retry the procedure until a readback confirms the write landed, or send commands over a reliable transport
